requirement: MCP tools for securities, bot commands, T+2 settlement state machine

tasks.title: MCP tools for securities
tasks.description:
Add securities MCP tools to admin-bot following the existing pattern in src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/trading.ts.

Create src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/securities.ts:

Import McpServer from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, z from zod, GatewayClient.

export function registerSecuritiesTools(server: McpServer, client: GatewayClient): void {

1. list_securities_instruments — GET /api/v1/securities/instruments
   Params: asset_class (optional string: EQUITY/BOND/ETF), trading_status (optional string)
   Returns formatted table: ticker | name | asset_class | lot_size | tick_size | status

2. get_securities_instrument — GET /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id}
   Params: instrument_id (required string)

3. create_securities_instrument — POST /api/v1/securities/instruments
   Params: ticker, name, asset_class (EQUITY/BOND/ETF), lot_size (number), tick_size (number), currency (default MNT)

4. submit_securities_order — POST /api/v1/securities/orders
   Params: instrument_id, side (BUY/SELL), order_type (LIMIT/MARKET), quantity (number), price (number, optional for MARKET)
   Returns order + any trades from matching

5. list_securities_positions — GET /api/v1/securities/positions
   Params: participant_id (optional)
   Returns formatted table: instrument | quantity | avg_cost | P&L

6. list_securities_orders — GET /api/v1/securities/orders
   Params: instrument_id (optional), status (optional)

7. cancel_securities_order — DELETE /api/v1/securities/orders/{id}
   Params: order_id (required)

Then register in src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/index.ts — add import and call registerSecuritiesTools(server, client).

Format responses as readable text tables (not raw JSON) for bot readability.

Run: cd src/admin-bot/mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: T+2 settlement engine
tasks.description:
Implement the T+2 settlement state machine in the securities-service.

Read docs/securities-architecture.md section 7 (T+2 Settlement State Machine) for the full spec.

Create src/securities-service/internal/settlement/engine.go:

1. SettlementEngine struct with tradeStore, positionStore, and a new SettlementStore

2. Add SettlementObligation type to types.go:
   - ID, TradeID, InstrumentID, BuyerParticipantID, SellerParticipantID
   - Quantity int, Price float64, NetAmount float64
   - SettlementDate string, Status string (PENDING/AFFIRMED/NETTED/INSTRUCTED/SETTLING/SETTLED/FAILED)
   - CreatedAt, UpdatedAt

3. Add SettlementStore interface to store.go:
   - Create(*SettlementObligation) error
   - Get(id string) (*SettlementObligation, error)
   - ListByDate(date string) ([]SettlementObligation, error)
   - ListByStatus(status string) ([]SettlementObligation, error)
   - UpdateStatus(id string, status string) error
   - InMemorySettlementStore implementation

4. SettlementEngine methods:
   - CreateObligationsFromTrades(trades []SecurityTrade) error — for each trade, create a SettlementObligation with status PENDING
   - ProcessSettlementCycle(date string) (*SettlementResult, error):
     a. Get all obligations for date with status PENDING → mark AFFIRMED
     b. Net obligations by instrument+participant → mark AFFIRMED → NETTED
     c. Mark NETTED → SETTLED (simplified — no real CSD integration)
     d. Return SettlementResult{Processed, Settled, Failed int}

5. Wire into matching engine — after creating trades in MatchOrder, call settlement.CreateObligationsFromTrades

6. Add settlement HTTP endpoints to securities-service:
   - GET /api/v1/securities/settlements?date=2026-04-25&status=PENDING
   - POST /api/v1/securities/settlements/cycle {"date": "2026-04-25"} — trigger ProcessSettlementCycle
   - Wire routes in server.go

7. Add gateway proxy routes for /api/v1/securities/settlements/*

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Settlement tests + bot MCP tool for /settle
tasks.description:
Write tests for the settlement engine and add a settle MCP tool.

Part A — Settlement tests at src/securities-service/internal/settlement/engine_test.go:
1. TestCreateObligationsFromTrades — create 2 trades, verify 2 obligations with PENDING status
2. TestProcessSettlementCycle_Simple — create obligations, run cycle, verify all SETTLED
3. TestProcessSettlementCycle_NoObligations — run cycle for date with no obligations → 0 processed
4. TestProcessSettlementCycle_Netting — 2 trades same instrument+participants, verify netted quantities
5. TestSettlementStore_CRUD — create, get, list by date, list by status, update status

Part B — Add settle MCP tool to src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/securities.ts:
- trigger_settlement_cycle — POST /api/v1/securities/settlements/cycle
  Params: date (string, YYYY-MM-DD format)
  Returns: settled count, failed count
- list_settlement_obligations — GET /api/v1/securities/settlements
  Params: date (optional), status (optional)
  Returns: formatted table

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
